channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Japan's Military Rearmament and Its Impact on Asia's Post-War Order
item.description: Japan is undergoing a significant military transformation, as it begins deploying advanced long-range missiles developed by Mitsubishi Heavy Industries. These missiles, capable of striking targets as ...

item.title: SA Schools Seek Greater Parental Support for Pregnant Pupils Amidst New Regulations
item.description: New regulations are being finalised to address the increasing number of teenage pregnancies in South African schools, prompting calls for greater parental involvement and responsibility. School leader...

item.title: Kavitha launches Telangana Rashtra Sena after suspension from BRS
item.description: On Saturday, Kavitha, daughter of former Telangana Chief Minister K Chandrasekhar Rao, officially launched her own political party named 'Telangana Rashtra Sena' (TRS) at an event held on the outskirt...

item.title: Seven AAP Rajya Sabha MPs seek to merge with BJP amid internal crisis
item.description: Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) is facing a major political crisis after seven of its Rajya Sabha MPs, led by senior leader Raghav Chadha, announced they were leaving the party and planning to merge with the Bh...

item.title: Rapper Paul N Ballin opens up about his dual persona and journey in music
item.description: Filipino rapper Paul N Ballin, one of Spotify RADAR Philippines’ featured artists for 2026, is gaining attention not just for his strong stage presence but also for the contrast between his onstage pe...

item.title: KRA Sends Notices to Kenyans to Settle Outstanding Taxes by April 30
item.description: The Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA) recently sent official messages to several Kenyans, notifying them of outstanding tax arrears that need to be settled by April 30, 2026. The notices targeted individu...

item.title: Court of Appeals Issues Freeze Order on Romualdez's Assets Over Flood Control Project Allegations
item.description: The Court of Appeals has issued a freeze order on the assets of former Speaker and current Leyte representative Ferdinand Martin Romualdez, according to Ombudsman Jesus Crispin Remulla. The order, whi...

item.title: Experts Warn of Terror Groups Using AI, Crypto, and Encrypted Apps for Global Operations
item.description: At a panel held by Pakistan’s Permanent Mission and the UN Office of Counter-Terrorism in New York, experts highlighted how terrorist organisations are increasingly exploiting artificial intelligence,...

item.title: Federal Government Approves Allowance Increase and Retirement Benefits for Civil Servants
item.description: Federal Government don approve increase in allowances and welfare benefits for civil servants as part of effort to reduce the serious economic hardship wey dey affect workers across the country. The a...

item.title: Jamil Abubakar Appointed MD of Dangote Group's Logistics and Infrastructure Division
item.description: Jamil Mohammed Abubakar has been appointed as the Managing Director of Infrastructure and Logistics at Dangote Group, one of Africa’s largest industrial conglomerates. In his new role, Abubakar will o...

item.title: Uttarakhand Board 2026 Results: Official Websites and Direct Download Link Available
item.description: The Uttarakhand Board of Secondary Education (UBSE) is set to release the results for the 2026 board exams today. Students can access their results through official websites, with a direct download li...

item.title: B.C. regulator suspends massage therapist following complaint of non-consensual treatment
item.description: A registered massage therapist in British Columbia has been suspended after a regulatory body found that a patient received breast massage treatment without giving proper consent. The College of Compl...

item.title: Dalung Questions Official Reason Behind Edun's Resignation as Finance Minister
item.description: Solomon Dalung, a former Minister of Youth and Sports, has expressed doubts over the official reason given for the resignation of Finance Minister, Wale Edun, citing health challenges as the main caus...

item.title: Evidence Suggests a Possible Superkilonova Hidden Within a Supernova
item.description: Astronomers may have observed a previously unknown type of stellar explosion, referred to as a 'superkilonova,' where a kilonova occurs within a supernova. The event, AT2025ulz, was first detected thr...

item.title: Hutson’s overtime winner lifts Canadiens past Lightning in Game 3 to claim series lead
item.description: Lane Hutson scored early in overtime to give the Montreal Canadiens a 3-2 win over the Tampa Bay Lightning in Game 3 of their first-round NHL playoff series, putting Montreal ahead 2-1 in the best-of-...

item.title: Alexandre Boulerice to leave federal NDP and run provincially for Québec Solidaire
item.description: Alexandre Boulerice, the only New Democratic Party (NDP) Member of Parliament in Quebec, is planning to leave federal politics and run provincially for Québec Solidaire, according to sources cited by ...

item.title: Maine Governor Rejects Data Center Ban While Proposing Study and Limiting Tax Incentives
item.description: Maine Governor Janet Mills vetoed a proposed bill that would have imposed the first statewide moratorium in the United States on the construction of new data centers. While she expressed general suppo...

item.title: Iranian Foreign Minister's Visit to Islamabad Signals Progress for US-Iran Talks
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad on April 25, 2026, with a formal response from Tehran to US proposals delivered through Pakistan. This visit marks a significant step in on...

item.title: Veteran actors collaborate with rising talents in ABS-CBN’s iWant series “Young Blood”
item.description: ABS-CBN has announced a new iWant original series titled “Young Blood,” bringing together respected veteran actors Jaime Fabregas, Bodjie Pascua, and Freddie Webb with a group of emerging talents from...

item.title: Islamabad and Rawalpindi impose strict traffic restrictions amid security for foreign delegates
item.description: The district administration in Islamabad has enforced strict security and traffic measures in connection with the arrival of foreign delegates for the expected US-Iran talks. As part of these arrangem...
